questions.q: How many U.S. senators are there in total?
questions.explanation: Two senators from each of the 50 states make 100.

questions.q: How many senators does each state have?
questions.explanation: Every state has two senators regardless of population.

questions.q: How long is a Senate term?
questions.explanation: Senators serve six-year terms, with about one-third elected every two years.

questions.q: Which power belongs to the Senate?
questions.explanation: The Senate confirms nominees, approves treaties, and tries impeachments.

questions.q: What did the Seventeenth Amendment change about the Senate?
options: It created the direct election of senators by voters
It shortened terms to two years
